log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist.
→ Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist: CON save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 20] FAIL! 33 necrotic damage. HP: 26/59
--- Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist --- HP: 26/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 3 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist --- HP: 13/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (13/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Deep Gnome — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
